summary: Decent audience recording of a solid show with a standout Carlos solo on Stella Blue.
review: The performance is described as good but not great, with the highlight being Carlos's incredible solo on "Stella Blue" that adds a special touch to the second set. No specific comments about sound quality are given, so the recording can be assumed average for an audience source.
